2026-03-03 11:25:56
Rachel Reid discusses writing ‘Unrivaled’ and Shane Hollander’s hero arc across the three Hollanov books “I do think that the three books, as a trilogy, it’s Shane who has like the hero’s arc. I think, even in The Long Game, it’s Shane. As much as the book focuses on Ilya, Shane is the one with that arc, and I do think that continues into this one [Unrivaled]. I do think Shane sort of is the main character of these three books. It’s pretty even, I think, in [Unrivaled], because it’s really about them as a unit. They’re not apart very much. It’s probably a little more even than the other ones.” “It’s been fun kind of writing them — especially Shane, having to face the fact that he’s not going to be playing hockey forever. You know, his body’s gonna start to not do what it used to do.” “I think having them at an age where maybe they’re starting to think about the future, beyond hockey, and their lives together, is nice. It’s a very different vibe from writing them in their teens and early 20s, much like anyone’s thinking about different things, usually, when they’re into their 30s.” 🔗 Watch the full interview here: https://www.out.com/books/rachel-reid-unrivaled

2026-03-02 17:27:20
Connor Storrie on his chemistry with Hudson Williams being a factor behind “Heated Rivalry”’s popularity “For as long as I’ve been aware of popular culture, longing, devotion, love — the whole package — felt deeply uncool. It didn’t matter. On the other hand, it’s hard for me to explain why ‘Heated Rivalry’ resonated the way it did, because I see it from the inside. What I find important might not be what audiences see. But one theme always comes up: the chemistry between Hudson and me. We genuinely love and understand each other, and I think that shows. And there was so much enthusiasm poured into this project.” 🔗 https://vogueadria.com/heated-rivalry-connor-storrie-interview/

original tweet

2026-03-02 17:27:20
Connor Storrie on his chemistry with Hudson Williams being a factor behind “Heated Rivalry”’s popularity “For as long as I’ve been aware of popular culture, longing, devotion, love — the whole package — felt deeply uncool. It didn’t matter. On the other hand, it’s hard for me to explain why ‘Heated Rivalry’ resonated the way it did, because I see it from the inside. What I find important might not be what audiences see. But one theme always comes up: the chemistry between Hudson and me. We genuinely love and understand each other, and I think that shows. And there was so much enthusiasm poured into this project.” 🔗 https://vogueadria.com/heated-rivalry-connor-storrie-interview/

2026-03-02 17:27:20
Connor Storrie on his chemistry with Hudson Williams being a factor behind “Heated Rivalry”’s popularity “For as long as I’ve been aware of popular culture, longing, devotion, love — the whole package — felt deeply uncool. It didn’t matter. On the other hand, it’s hard for me to explain why ‘Heated Rivalry’ resonated the way it did, because I see it from the inside. What I find important might not be what audiences see. But one theme always comes up: the chemistry between Hudson and me. We genuinely love and understand each other, and I think that shows. And there was so much enthusiasm poured into this project.” 🔗 https://vogueadria.com/heated-rivalry-connor-storrie-interview/

2026-03-02 05:47:48
Hudson Williams with a fan today at the airport! “So I ran into Hudson at the airport this evening while picking up a student. He was all incognito so I wasn't certain it was him. He was right behind us while we waited for luggage. Then I saw a man shake his hand. I asked who it was...oh some actor from Heated Rivalry. So I went right up to him and said Hi and asked to shake his hand ...cuz all about consent. Showed him the hockey jersey stickers on my phone from @ mmzanitav and told him about the Heated Rivalry earrings I beaded. I told him how the show has brought me through some darker days too. The BEST love story. We talked about SNL last night too. His driver took our pic! What a sweet young man. @ hudsonwilliamsofficial @ heatedrivalrycrave. I am beaming! My most favorite show ever” via oceanloverjen

original tweet

2026-03-02 05:47:48
Hudson Williams with a fan today at the airport! “So I ran into Hudson at the airport this evening while picking up a student. He was all incognito so I wasn't certain it was him. He was right behind us while we waited for luggage. Then I saw a man shake his hand. I asked who it was...oh some actor from Heated Rivalry. So I went right up to him and said Hi and asked to shake his hand ...cuz all about consent. Showed him the hockey jersey stickers on my phone from @ mmzanitav and told him about the Heated Rivalry earrings I beaded. I told him how the show has brought me through some darker days too. The BEST love story. We talked about SNL last night too. His driver took our pic! What a sweet young man. @ hudsonwilliamsofficial @ heatedrivalrycrave. I am beaming! My most favorite show ever” via oceanloverjen

2026-03-01 20:50:36
This is a wrap for #HudsonWilliamsFF and honestly… I’m so emotional I could cry 🥹 What started as a silly little idea turned into something so special because you showed up - you participated, engaged, watched, shared, and commented. Thank you from the bottom of our hearts for always supporting Hudson’s filmography, his art, and also our fandom projects and HWU. None of this exists without you. 🫰🏻 We’re so grateful to be part of this loving little ville - a space full of warmth, whimsy, joy, and community. May this community always be full of protection, celebration, and love for Hudson and everything he creates. There’s no space for hate as Hudson is full of love. 🧚‍♀️

original tweet

2026-03-01 16:25:10
BONUS ‼️ Today’s #HudsonWilliamsFF short film is “The Walls”! We didn’t have this film when we started this project, so enjoy one more day of #HudsonWilliamsFF! 🎥 Link to Watch: https://youtu.be/XU1kdgG7Uvs?si=QIVfFgDIals4pSw3 IMO: Hudson really is such a versatile actor. His character, Jerry, is so creepy 😭 The close-up shots make this extra ominous. My favourite scene is when Jerry’s making the rat noises in the wall. Share your favourite scene and your insights about it in the replies!

original tweet

BONUS ‼️ Today’s #HudsonWilliamsFF short film is “The Walls”! We didn’t have this film when we started this project, so enjoy one more day of #HudsonWilliamsFF! 🎥 Link to Watch: https://youtu.be/XU1kdgG7Uvs?si=QIVfFgDIals4pSw3 IMO: Hudson really is such a versatile actor. His character, Jerry, is so creepy 😭 The close-up shots make this extra ominous. My favourite scene is when Jerry’s making the rat noises in the wall. Share your favourite scene and your insights about it in the replies!

original tweet
